create_table_sql:
CREATE TABLE `token_blacklist_outstandingtoken` (
  `id` bigint NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `token` longtext COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime(6) DEFAULT NULL,
  `expires_at` datetime(6) NOT NULL,
  `user_id` bigint DEFAULT NULL,
  `jti` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `token_blacklist_outstandingtoken_jti_hex_d9bdf6f7_uniq` (`jti`),
  KEY `token_blacklist_outs_user_id_83bc629a_fk_dvadmin_s` (`user_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `token_blacklist_outs_user_id_83bc629a_fk_dvadmin_s` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `dvadmin_system_users` (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=3 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT='outstanding token'
